subject: Add rt_c_file_io and verify e2e
description: Add rt_c_file_io.c (fopen/fwrite/fseek/fread/fclose/unlink with self-validation via rt_fail on mismatch). Wire it. Run e2e: confirm RC=0, "41 bytes round-tripped" in log, /tmp/rt_c_file_io.tmp absent. Then sanity-check failure path: corrupt the payload and confirm harness reports "expected exit 0, got 1".
